compiled_state.title: Write failing tests for sprint-drift-check.sh --status filter
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify existing test file tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh to add test cases for the new --status=<status> filter argument on sprint-drift-check.sh. Tests must FAIL (RED) before Task 2 implements the filter.

## Test Cases
1. When --status=open is passed, only children with status "open" are processed for drift detection — in_progress and closed children are excluded
2. When --status is not passed, all children are processed (backward compatibility)
3. --status=invalid returns a non-zero exit code
4. Mixed-status children test: given children with statuses open, in_progress, and closed, assert only the open child's files appear in drift output when --status=open

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 new test functions for --status filter
  Verify: grep -c "test.*status" tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) when run against current sprint-drift-check.sh (which has no --status support)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh 2>&1 | grep -qE 'FAIL.*status'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh, .test-index. Tests: RED confirmed (5 new assertions failing, 17 existing pass).
comments.author: Test
